title: Grilled Flank Steak with Malty Crust
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make flank steak recipe, topped with a malty crust, perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: malty
ingredients.notes: crushed malted barley or malt vinegar

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat (400°F).
Season the flank steak with flaky sea salt, burger seasoning, and a pinch of black pepper.
In a small bowl, mix together malty, beef, and a pinch of salt to create the malty crust.
Brush the malty crust mixture evenly onto both sides of the flank steak.
Grill the flank steak for 4-5 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Let the flank steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
